title: sphaeralcea coulteri var. californica
intro: Sphaeralcea coulteri var. californica, also known as Coulter's globe mallow or California globe mallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds that have been shown to have antiseptic and antiviral effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and support immune function. Coulter's globe mallow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
